patternCompliance.note: get_reverse_dependency_files uses numbered params ($f0..$fN); remove_edges_from_file uses named param $fp. No string interpolation of user data.
No new dependencies. kuzu remains sole external dep behind lazy import.
No new module-level imports. impact_analysis still lazy-imported inside methods.
Returns 7-key dict matching workflow_memory.py:1047-1069 formatter exactly. All values are GraphNode lists.

performanceFindings.description: context() makes 8 storage calls (1 get_node + 1 callers + 1 callees + 2 imports + 4 heritage). Acceptable for single-node queries; could batch if profiling shows latency.
Affected unchanged files parsed sequentially during reindex edge rebuild. Typically a small set in incremental reindex; could parallelize with ThreadPoolExecutor if profiling warrants.
remove_edges_from_file() deletes ALL outgoing edges from affected files (including edges to other unchanged files), then rebuilds them all. Slightly wasteful but correct and simple.

principleNotes.note: 4 source files touched across 3 plans. No drive-by edits. Only code directly related to the 6 findings was modified.
Reuses existing storage.get_related_nodes() for all new neighborhood queries. No new abstractions or helper classes added.
Each plan verified with py_compile + targeted grep. Fresh output inspected before every commit.
All 6 fixed findings (P0 x1, P1 x3, P2 x2) match CONTEXT.json scope exactly. No scope creep.

evidence: CONTEXT.json documents 8 findings (P0-P3). Plans 01-03 address the top 6 (P0 x1, P1 x3, P2 x2). Remaining P2 proximity + P3 hook items documented as out-of-scope.
Plan 01 goal: 'Fix P0 reindex edge loss and P1 search cache staleness'. Implemented: reverse-dep collection + edge rebuild in index(); _hybrid_search = None reset. Exact match.

Plan 02 goal: 'Fix P1 heritage label bug, P1 blast-radius KeyError, P2 flows auto-index'. Implemented: class_index.get() in heritage.py; label key in review_impact(); graph.index() in cmd_graph_flows(). Exact match.
Plan 03 goal: 'Fix P2 context() contract drift'. Implemented: context() returns 7-key dict. Exact match.
Declared files across 3 plans: __init__.py, storage.py, heritage.py, workflow_memory.py. Changed files: exactly those 4 + issues.jsonl (memory tracking). No scope violations.
Phase progression: discuss -> plan -> implement -> review -> ship (correct lifecycle).
4 commits on branch: 3 implementation + 1 docs. Commit messages follow conventional-commit and match plan commitMessage fields.
stageReviews.notes: Full feature review covering Plans 01-03 (4 source files, 6 findings fixed). TDD waived per each plan's tdd.reason (kuzu unavailable in dev/test).

findings.description: context() callers unwrapped from (GraphNode, float) to plain GraphNode list. callers_with_confidence() preserved at __init__.py:264 for consumers needing confidence scores. This is a clean separation.
parent_classes combines EXTENDS+IMPLEMENTS outgoing; child_classes combines EXTENDS+IMPLEMENTS incoming. Matches CLI formatter iteration pattern at workflow_memory.py:1057-1069 exactly.

get_reverse_dependency_files() uses parameterized Cypher with $f0..$fN placeholders. Guards empty input early. Returns DISTINCT file_paths. Follows same pattern as existing get_all_relationships_by_types().

Heritage fix: class_index.get(child_name) returns correct node ID for all class-like labels (CLASS, INTERFACE, TYPE_ALIAS, ENUM). The _build_class_index() already queries all class-like nodes via storage.get_class_like_nodes(). Unused imports (NodeLabel, generate_id) properly removed.

evidence: Plan 01 — __init__.py: Reverse deps collected BEFORE remove_nodes_by_file() (edges still exist at that point). affected_fps filtered to current_paths and excludes changed files (no double-processing). Edge rebuild runs only edge phases (imports/calls/heritage/types/exports), NOT process_symbols/process_structure.
Plan 01 — __init__.py: _hybrid_search = None at top of index(). Correct sentinel protocol (None = not attempted, False = unavailable, instance = ready).

Plan 01 — storage.py: get_reverse_dependency_files() parameterized Cypher, guards empty input, returns DISTINCT paths. remove_edges_from_file() reuses same MATCH pattern as remove_nodes_by_file() first query.

Plan 02 — heritage.py: class_index.get(child_name) replaces generate_id(NodeLabel.CLASS, file_path, child_name). No longer hardcodes CLASS label. Handles INTERFACE, TYPE_ALIAS, ENUM children correctly.
Plan 02 — __init__.py:291: 'label': ir.node.label.value added to review_impact() entry dict. CLI formatter at workflow_memory.py:1018 accesses e['label'] — KeyError prevented.
Plan 02 — workflow_memory.py:883: graph.index() before graph.flows(). Matches auto-index pattern used by graph-context, graph-blast-radius, and graph-coupling.

Plan 03 — __init__.py: context() returns 7-key dict. CLI JSON formatter (lines 1047-1054) and text formatter (lines 1057-1069) iterate all 7 keys using .name, .label.value, .file_path — all return GraphNode lists. Contract aligned.
Plan 03 — __init__.py: callers unwrapped via [n for n, _conf in ...]. Clean list comprehension, no tuple leakage to CLI.
stageReviews.notes: Clean, minimal changes across all 3 plans. Follows existing code patterns throughout. No new dependencies, no new abstractions.
